# Code of Conduct

## Our Pledge

We want this project to be a welcoming, respectful place for contributors and users. Everyone participating in the project is expected to communicate with care, assume good intent, and help keep discussions focused and constructive.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful of different experience levels and viewpoints.
- Give and accept feedback gracefully.
- Keep issues and pull requests focused on the work.
- Help create an environment where people can participate without harassment.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, insults, threats, or personal attacks.
- Discriminatory language or behavior.
- Publishing private information without permission.
- Repeatedly derailing technical discussions.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may moderate, edit, hide, or remove comments, issues, pull requests, or other contributions that violate this code of conduct. Serious or repeated violations may result in temporary or permanent restrictions from participating in the project.

If you need to report behavior, contact a maintainer through a private channel when possible. Include relevant links, screenshots, or context so the report can be reviewed fairly.
